content.icp_fit_reason: AI-native generative radiology workflow platform (Series C, $140M+ total raised); 51-200 employees in San Francisco; live product deployed across health systems providing ~half of US medical imaging, with a product described as 'the first GenAI product in healthcare'.

content.industry: AI Healthcare Voice Agents / Patient Communication
content.icp_fit_reason: AI-powered responsible conversational agent platform purpose-built for healthcare, deployed at 45+ major US health systems; 51-200 employees; growth funding (October 2025) following Series B, co-founded by Israeli entrepreneurs Israel Krush and Rom Cohen.

AI cancer pathology diagnostics platform for clinical labs and biopharma; dual US (Brookline, MA) and Israel (Tel Aviv) presence qualifying both geographies; 51-200 employees; Series C backed by 83North, Sienna VC, and Octopus Ventures.

content.industry: AI Autonomous Medical Coding / Revenue Cycle
content.icp_fit_reason: Explainable autonomous medical coding AI with offices in New York and Tel Aviv; 51-200 employees; growth equity round led by PSG and GV with $95M total raised; live product processing real clinical claims at scale.
content.recent_funding: Growth Equity $47M, October 2024 (led by PSG, GV, Addition; total $95M)

content.industry: AI Ambient Medical Scribe / Clinical Documentation
content.icp_fit_reason: AI ambient scribe specifically targeting small and mid-sized practices (25,000+ clinicians as of 2025); 51-200 employees in San Francisco; Series A (April 2025); named to CBInsights Digital Health 50 2025 as differentiated from Abridge by its focus on independent clinics.

content.industry: AI Primary Care Clinical Intelligence / Value-Based Care
content.icp_fit_reason: AI copilot for primary care and value-based care that synthesizes patient data for confident clinical decisions; HQ in New York with Israeli founding team (86% usage rate at organizations like Privia Health and agilon health); Series C in April 2025; 2025 Best in KLAS for Clinician Digital Workflow.
content.recent_funding: Series C $55M, April 2025 (led by Goldman Sachs Alternatives)

content.industry: AI Autonomous Medical Coding / Revenue Cycle
content.icp_fit_reason: Autonomous medical coding AI platform for health systems and large physician groups, powered by ML trained on clinical documentation; 51-200 employees in Boston; $111M total raised across Series A and B; live product with documented 96%+ coding accuracy.

AI-powered clinical research platform for gastroenterology and adjacent specialties (GI, hepatology, cardiology, obesity); 51-200 employees, Cambridge MA; Series C $77M in April 2026; combines AI pre-screening with a research site network for faster clinical trial enrollment.
content.recent_funding: Series C $77M, April 2026 (led by Intrepid Growth Partners, GV)

content.industry: AI Pharmacy Workflow Automation / Healthcare Operations
content.icp_fit_reason: Leading AI workflow automation platform purpose-built for pharmacy teams (340B, intake authorization, complex pharmacy operations); 51-200 employees in San Francisco; Series B $50M in May 2025 backed by Bessemer Venture Partners; deployed across 95+ health systems and pharmacies.

content.industry: AI Clinical Chart Review / Data Abstraction
content.icp_fit_reason: AI-powered chart review and clinical data abstraction platform for health systems; 11-50 employees (lean, under-the-radar); Series A in April 2025 backed by Define Ventures and GV; named to CBInsights Digital Health 50 2025 with Mosaic score of 830.
